scripts.build:frontend: cd .. && npx vite build --config vite.config.online.ts && node -e "const{cpSync,existsSync,mkdirSync,rmSync}=require('fs');const{join}=require('path');const d='server/public';if(existsSync(d))rmSync(d,{recursive:true});mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});cpSync('dist',d,{recursive:true});console.log('Copied to server/public/')"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:server
